items.title: Quantum Computing Summer Fellowship
items.description: Competitive internship at LANL in quantum computing and quantum information. Acceptance ratio < 3%.

items.title: Junior Scientist Scholarship — AQC 2023
items.description: Scholarship covering travel and accommodation for AQC 2023, New Mexico. Host: Prof. Tameem Albash.

items.title: CONICET Research Scholarship
items.description: Doctoral scholarship in Physics awarded by the National Scientific and Technical Research Council of Argentina.

items.title: EVC-CIN Scholarship
items.description: One-year grant for academic merit supporting undergraduate scientific research.
